title: Block 2 mid-point: paragraph practice
description: Real paragraph with full punctuation set — preview of writing fluency
text: we work hard, study every day, and never give up. "do we?" she asked. "yes!" they said. it's a good life, and we share it with friends.
tips: Longest text so far — 130 chars with 7+ punctuation marks
If you slow down on punctuation, that's normal. Speed comes with practice
20% of Block 2 done — numbers and symbols come next

character_tips.anna: Block 2 mid-point! You can already write real paragraphs. Numbers and symbols are next.
character_tips.maxim: 130 characters with full punctuation — that's professional-level writing. Onwards.
